---
title: "Unsubscribe"
toc: false
---

<p id="unsub-msg" style="font-size: 1rem; color: #555;">Processing your request…</p>

<script>
(async function () {
  const msgEl = document.getElementById("unsub-msg");
  const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
  const token  = params.get("token");

  if (!token) {
    msgEl.textContent = "No unsubscribe token found. The link may be invalid or already used.";
    return;
  }

  try {
    const res  = await fetch("https://olssvguaeagsmkfmsvvo.supabase.co/functions/v1/unsubscribe", {
      method: "POST",
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      body: JSON.stringify({ token }),
    });
    const data = await res.json();
    if (data.ok) {
      msgEl.textContent = "You've been unsubscribed. No more emails from me.";
    } else {
      msgEl.textContent = data.error || "Something went wrong. Please try again.";
    }
  } catch {
    msgEl.textContent = "Network error. Please try again or reply to any of my emails.";
  }
})();
</script>
